AUTH_LOGIN_FAILED.text: Login failed for {username} — invalid credentials. Attempt {attempt} of {max_attempts}.

AUTH_ACCOUNT_LOCKED.text: Account {username} locked after {max_attempts} failed login attempts.

AUTH_SESSION_EXPIRED.text: Session expired for {display_name} — please sign in again.

AUTH_TOTP_FAILED.text: TOTP verification failed for {display_name} — code invalid or expired.

AUTH_ROLE_CHANGED.text: Role changed for {target_user} from {old_role} to {new_role} by {changed_by}.

CTS_NGCH_SUBMITTED.text: Cheque {instrument_id} successfully filed to NGCH — reference {ngch_ref}.

CTS_NGCH_SUBMIT_FAILED.text: NGCH submission failed for {instrument_id} — error: {error_code}. Retrying.

CTS_NGCH_DUPLICATE_DETECTED.text: Duplicate filing detected for {instrument_id} — NGCH idempotency key matched. Skipped.

CTS_NGCH_IET_EXPIRED.text: IET window expired for {instrument_id} — filing accepted by NGCH as deemed approval.

CTS_NGCH_MAINTENANCE_WINDOW.text: NGCH is in maintenance window — {instrument_id} queued for filing on reconnect.

CTS_WF_CHEQUE_RECEIVED.text: Cheque {instrument_id} received from {bank} — queued for processing.

CTS_WF_OCR_LOW_CONFIDENCE.text: OCR confidence below threshold for {instrument_id} — routed to human review.

CTS_WF_ALTERATION_DETECTED.text: Alteration detected on cheque {instrument_id} — field: {field}. Routed to human review.

CTS_WF_SIGNATURE_VERIFIED.text: Signature verified for account {account_display} on cheque {instrument_id}.

CTS_WF_SIGNATURE_MISMATCH.text: Signature mismatch for account {account_display} — cheque {instrument_id} routed to human review.

CTS_WF_VAULT_MISS.text: No signature specimen on record for {account_display} — cheque {instrument_id} routed to human review.

CTS_WF_FRAUD_SCORE_HIGH.text: Fraud score {score} exceeds threshold for {instrument_id} — routed to human review.

CTS_WF_STP_CONFIRMED.text: Cheque {instrument_id} auto-confirmed via STP — filed to NGCH.

CTS_WF_HUMAN_REVIEW_ASSIGNED.text: Cheque {instrument_id} assigned to reviewer {reviewer} — IET deadline {iet_deadline}.

CTS_WF_HUMAN_CONFIRMED.text: Reviewer {reviewer} confirmed cheque {instrument_id} — filed to NGCH.

CTS_WF_IET_WATCHDOG_FIRED.text: IET watchdog triggered for {instrument_id} — emergency filing initiated with {seconds_remaining}s remaining.

CTS_WF_REVIEW_TIMEOUT.text: Human review timed out for {instrument_id} after {elapsed_minutes} minutes — auto-returned.

EJ_LOG_INGESTED.text: EJ log received from ATM {atm_id} — {transaction_count} transactions, size {size_kb}KB.

EJ_PARSE_COMPLETE.text: EJ normalisation complete for ATM {atm_id} — {parsed_count} records extracted, OEM: {oem}.

EJ_PARSE_FAILED.text: EJ parsing failed for ATM {atm_id} — {failed_count} records below confidence threshold.

EJ_DISPUTE_MATCHED.text: Dispute {claim_id} matched to EJ record for ATM {atm_id} — confidence {confidence_pct}%.

EJ_ATM_HEALTH_DEGRADED.text: ATM {atm_id} health degraded — {anomaly_type} detected. Predictive alert issued.

EJ_ATM_HEALTH_CRITICAL.text: ATM {atm_id} in critical state — {fault_description}. Immediate attention required.

PLATFORM_POLICY_UPDATED.text: OPA policy {policy_name} updated to version {version} by {updated_by}.

PLATFORM_CBS_UNREACHABLE.text: CBS {cbs_type} unreachable for bank {bank_id} — switching to degraded mode.

PLATFORM_CBS_RECOVERED.text: CBS {cbs_type} connection restored for bank {bank_id} after {downtime_minutes} minutes.

PLATFORM_AUDIT_WRITE_FAILED.text: Immudb write failed for event {event_type} — retrying. Instrument: {instrument_id}.

PLATFORM_MODEL_DRIFT_ALERT.text: Model {model_name} drift detected — metric {metric} dropped {drop_pct}% over {window_days} days.

VAULT_SIGNATURE_LOADED.text: Signature vault warmed for bank {bank_id} — {count} specimens loaded.

VAULT_SIGNATURE_STALE.text: Signature vault stale for bank {bank_id} — last synced {hours_ago}h ago. All cheques routed to human review.

VAULT_PPS_HIT.text: PPS match found for account {account_display} — cheque series {cheque_series}.

VAULT_PPS_MISS.text: No PPS record for account {account_display} — cheque {instrument_id} routed to human review.

VAULT_PPS_AMOUNT_MISMATCH.text: PPS amount mismatch for {instrument_id} — expected {expected_range}, presented {presented_range}.

VAULT_SYNC_COMPLETE.text: Vault sync complete for bank {bank_id} — signatures: {sig_count}, PPS entries: {pps_count}.

VAULT_SYNC_FAILED.text: Vault sync failed for bank {bank_id} — CBS error: {error_code}. Retaining existing vault data.
